growth_records.cite: Vees et al. Towards continuous industrial bioprocessing with solventogenic and acetogenic clostridia: challenges, progress and perspectives. Journal of Industrial Microbiology & Biotechnology (2020). DOI:10.1007/s10295-020-02296-2. [PMC7658081]
growth_records.snippet: C. beijerinckii NRRL B592 | Two-stage cascade + cell immob | D 0.5-0.6 pH 4.6-4.7 36C | D 0.15-0.20 pH 4.7-4.8 36C | Glucose | ABE 9.27 g/L 1.24 g/L/h; Butanol 5.57 g/L
growth_records.notes: SECONDARY DATA compiled in review Table; original citation: Gapes JR, Nimcevic D, Friedl A. Long-term continuous cultivation of Clostridium beijerinckii in a two-stage chemostat with on-line solvent removal. Appl Environ. Solventogenic/acetogenic Clostridium, anaerobic. Dilution rate D reported; growth rate NOT equal to D (multi-stage / cell-retention / immobilized -> growth uncoupled from D). Volumetric productivity (g/L/h) and yield (g/g) are the reported measured rates.

growth_records.cite: Vees et al. Towards continuous industrial bioprocessing with solventogenic and acetogenic clostridia: challenges, progress and perspectives. Journal of Industrial Microbiology & Biotechnology (2020). DOI:10.1007/s10295-020-02296-2. [PMC7658081]
growth_records.snippet: C. beijerinckii NRRL B592 | Two-stage cascade | Turbidostat D 0.12 pH 4.7 34C acid | Chemostat D 0.022 pH 4.7 34C solvent | Glucose | ABE 15 g/L 0.27 g/L/h; Butanol 9.1 g/L
growth_records.notes: SECONDARY DATA compiled in review Table; original citation: Mutschlechner O, Swoboda H, Gapes JR. Continuous two-stage ABE-fermentation using Clostridium beijerinckii NRRL B592 operating with a growth rate in the first s. Solventogenic/acetogenic Clostridium, anaerobic. Dilution rate D reported; growth rate NOT equal to D (multi-stage / cell-retention / immobilized -> growth uncoupled from D). Volumetric productivity (g/L/h) and yield (g/g) are the reported measured rates.

growth_records.cite: Vees et al. Towards continuous industrial bioprocessing with solventogenic and acetogenic clostridia: challenges, progress and perspectives. Journal of Industrial Microbiology & Biotechnology (2020). DOI:10.1007/s10295-020-02296-2. [PMC7658081]
growth_records.snippet: C. beijerinckii DSM 6423 | Two-stage chemostat | D 112 h-1 pH 4.8 | D 0.054 h-1 pH 5.1 | Glucose | ABE 10.56 g/L, 0.39 g/L/h
growth_records.notes: SECONDARY DATA compiled in review Table; original citation: Survase SA, Jurgens G, Van Heiningen A, Granström T. Continuous production of isopropanol and butanol using Clostridium beijerinckii DSM 6423. Appl Microbiol Bi. Solventogenic/acetogenic Clostridium, anaerobic. Dilution rate D reported; growth rate NOT equal to D (multi-stage / cell-retention / immobilized -> growth uncoupled from D). Volumetric productivity (g/L/h) and yield (g/g) are the reported measured rates. 1st-stage D printed as '112 h-1' in review Table 6 - implausible, likely 0.112 h-1 typo.

growth_records.cite: Vees et al. Towards continuous industrial bioprocessing with solventogenic and acetogenic clostridia: challenges, progress and perspectives. Journal of Industrial Microbiology & Biotechnology (2020). DOI:10.1007/s10295-020-02296-2. [PMC7658081]
growth_records.snippet: C. beijerinckii BA101 | Continuous packed bed | clay bricks | Glucose | ABE 15.8 g/L/h
growth_records.notes: SECONDARY DATA compiled in review Table; original citation: Qureshi N, Schripsema J, Lienhardt J, Blaschek HP. Continuous solvent production by Clostridium beijerinckii BA101 immobilized by adsorption onto brick. World J. Solventogenic/acetogenic Clostridium, anaerobic. Dilution rate D reported; growth rate NOT equal to D (multi-stage / cell-retention / immobilized -> growth uncoupled from D). Volumetric productivity (g/L/h) and yield (g/g) are the reported measured rates. Immobilized-cell / biofilm continuous reactor: only maximum volumetric productivity reported; no dilution rate, CDW, or growth rate. Growth uncoupled from reactor throughput. Carrier: adsorption, clay bricks. Continuous mode approximated as 'chemostat' (no biofilm enum).

growth_records.medium: Synthetic sugar mix (lignocellulose hydrolysate) (medium per cited study)
growth_records.cite: Vees et al. Towards continuous industrial bioprocessing with solventogenic and acetogenic clostridia: challenges, progress and perspectives. Journal of Industrial Microbiology & Biotechnology (2020). DOI:10.1007/s10295-020-02296-2. [PMC7658081]
growth_records.snippet: C. beijerinckii DSM 6423 | Continuous packed bed | wood pulp | Sugar mix | ABE 5.58 g/L/h
growth_records.notes: SECONDARY DATA compiled in review Table; original citation: Survase SA, Van Heiningen A, Granström T. Wood pulp as an immobilization matrix for the continuous production of isopropanol and butanol. J Ind Microbiol Biotec. Solventogenic/acetogenic Clostridium, anaerobic. Dilution rate D reported; growth rate NOT equal to D (multi-stage / cell-retention / immobilized -> growth uncoupled from D). Volumetric productivity (g/L/h) and yield (g/g) are the reported measured rates. Immobilized-cell / biofilm continuous reactor: only maximum volumetric productivity reported; no dilution rate, CDW, or growth rate. Growth uncoupled from reactor throughput. Carrier: adsorption, wood pulp. Continuous mode approximated as 'chemostat' (no biofilm enum).

growth_records.medium: Glucose + butyrate co-substrate (medium per cited study)
growth_records.cite: Vees et al. Towards continuous industrial bioprocessing with solventogenic and acetogenic clostridia: challenges, progress and perspectives. Journal of Industrial Microbiology & Biotechnology (2020). DOI:10.1007/s10295-020-02296-2. [PMC7658081]
growth_records.snippet: C. beijerinckii NCIMB 8052 | Chemostat immobilized | porous PVA | Glucose+butyrate | Butanol 0.40 g/L/h
growth_records.notes: SECONDARY DATA compiled in review Table; original citation: Lee S-M, Cho MO, Park CH, Chung Y-C, Kim JH, Sang B-I, Um Y. Continuous butanol production using suspended and immobilized Clostridium beijerinckii NCIMB 8052 w. Solventogenic/acetogenic Clostridium, anaerobic. Dilution rate D reported; growth rate NOT equal to D (multi-stage / cell-retention / immobilized -> growth uncoupled from D). Volumetric productivity (g/L/h) and yield (g/g) are the reported measured rates. Immobilized-cell / biofilm continuous reactor: only maximum volumetric productivity reported; no dilution rate, CDW, or growth rate. Growth uncoupled from reactor throughput. Carrier: encapsulation, porous polyvinyl alcohol. Continuous mode approximated as 'chemostat' (no biofilm enum).

growth_records.medium: Cassava bagasse hydrolysate (medium per cited study)
growth_records.cite: Vees et al. Towards continuous industrial bioprocessing with solventogenic and acetogenic clostridia: challenges, progress and perspectives. Journal of Industrial Microbiology & Biotechnology (2020). DOI:10.1007/s10295-020-02296-2. [PMC7658081]
growth_records.snippet: C. beijerinckii ATCC 6014 and C. tyrobutyricum ATCC 25755 | Continuous biofilm reactor | fibrous bed | Cassava bagasse hydrolysate | IB 0.44 g/L/h
growth_records.notes: SECONDARY DATA compiled in review Table; original citation: Zhang S, Qu C, Huang X, Suo Y, Liao Z, Wang J. Enhanced isopropanol and n-butanol production by supplying exogenous acetic acid via co-culturing two Clostridium. Solventogenic/acetogenic Clostridium, anaerobic. Dilution rate D reported; growth rate NOT equal to D (multi-stage / cell-retention / immobilized -> growth uncoupled from D). Volumetric productivity (g/L/h) and yield (g/g) are the reported measured rates. Immobilized-cell / biofilm continuous reactor: only maximum volumetric productivity reported; no dilution rate, CDW, or growth rate. Growth uncoupled from reactor throughput. Carrier: adsorption, fibrous bed. Continuous mode approximated as 'chemostat' (no biofilm enum).

growth_records.medium: not stated (review; primary source Qureshi et al., 2000)

sec.method: highest butanol-fermentation productivity reported, at D=2.0 h-1, review text + Table 2 (cited from Qureshi et al., 2000)

growth_records.cite: Zhang, Huifang et al. Clostridium acetobutylicum Biofilm: Advances in Understanding the Basis. Frontiers in Bioengineering and Biotechnology (2021). DOI:10.3389/fbioe.2021.658568. [PMC8209462]
growth_records.snippet: Qureshi et al. (2000) ... C. beijerinckii biofilm formed on clay bricks ... At a dilution rate of 2.0 h-1, a total solvent productivity of 15.8 g/L/h was reached ... highest productivity ever reported for butanol fermentation. Table 2: BA10
growth_records.notes: REVIEW-reproduced (Table 2 + text), original: Qureshi et al., 2000. Note organism is C. beijerinckii BA101 (not C. acetobutylicum). Biofilm-immobilized continuous fermentation; D=2.0 h-1 is reactor dilution rate NOT growth rate (immobilized cells). Volumetric solvent productivity 15.8 g/L/h, yield 0.38 g/g. No per-gDW or growth data.

growth_records.medium: not stated (review; primary source Chen and Blaschek, 1999)

sec.method: volumetric productivity, review Table 2 (cited from Chen and Blaschek, 1999)

growth_records.cite: Zhang, Huifang et al. Clostridium acetobutylicum Biofilm: Advances in Understanding the Basis. Frontiers in Bioengineering and Biotechnology (2021). DOI:10.3389/fbioe.2021.658568. [PMC8209462]
growth_records.snippet: Table 2: C. beijerinckii BA101 | Biofilm-immobilized cells, batch fermentation | 20.9 g/L | 0.41 g/g | 0.59 g/L/h | Chen and Blaschek, 1999.
growth_records.notes: REVIEW-reproduced (Table 2), original: Chen and Blaschek, 1999. C. beijerinckii BA101 biofilm batch fermentation. Butanol titer 20.9 g/L, solvent yield 0.41 g/g, productivity 0.59 g/L/h. No growth rate or per-gDW uptake/secretion data.

growth_records.medium: not stated (review; primary source Lee et al., 2008)

sec.method: volumetric productivity, review Table 2 (cited from Lee et al., 2008)

growth_records.cite: Zhang, Huifang et al. Clostridium acetobutylicum Biofilm: Advances in Understanding the Basis. Frontiers in Bioengineering and Biotechnology (2021). DOI:10.3389/fbioe.2021.658568. [PMC8209462]
growth_records.snippet: Table 2: C. beijerinckii NCIMB 8052 | Biofilm-immobilized cells, continuous fermentation | 13.4 g/L | 0.44 g/g | 0.40 g/L/h | Lee et al., 2008.
growth_records.notes: REVIEW-reproduced (Table 2), original: Lee et al., 2008. C. beijerinckii NCIMB 8052 biofilm continuous fermentation. Butanol titer 13.4 g/L, solvent yield 0.44 g/g, productivity 0.40 g/L/h. Dilution rate not restated in review. No growth rate or per-gDW data.
